choices.text: tf2 library in ROS 2. Tree of frames (map → odom → base_link → sensors); transforms via buffer.lookup_transform(). Static (URDF rigid links) + dynamic (joint state, odometry) transforms published continuously.

questions.explanation: tf2 library handles frame tree + transforms.

choices.text: Quaternions (x,y,z,w): no gimbal lock, composable via multiplication, 4 numbers. tf_transformations.quaternion_from_euler converts. Euler easier to read but problematic near singularities.
